hero.title:
Hello Future Bachelier!
 This is Your Way to BAC
hero.subtitle: Get to know BACWAY and dive into an ocean of resources assured by outstanding bacheliers to be one of them in the near future
hero.subinfo: +600 students from all around the country considered Bacway as an ultimate resource hub for high schoolers.
hero.more: Together, we’re building a nationwide hub of collaboration and learning. Whether you’re a student aiming high or a partner sharing expertise, BACWAY connects you to a future shaped by knowledge.

about.title: We’re building the platform we wish we had during BAC
about.subtitle: Bacway is a student-driven platform dedicated to providing high school students with access to quality educational resources. Founded by a group of passionate students, Bacway aims to create a collaborative community where students can share and access study materials, past exam papers, and other resources to help them succeed in their academic journey.
values: Collaboration: We believe in the power of community and the importance of sharing knowledge.
Quality: We are committed to providing high-quality resources that meet the needs of our users.
Accessibility: We strive to make educational resources accessible to all students, regardless of their background or location.
Integrity: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and transparency in all our interactions.
about.version: Let us know what you think
about.teamdescription: The folks behind Bacway are elite students from prestigious higher institutions and universities.

contribute.title: Share Your Knowledge. Shape Their Future.
contribute.subtitle: Become part of a national community where students uplift each other by sharing real, useful BAC resources. Your uploads matter.

collab.title: We’re Stronger When We Work Together
collab.subtitle: Clubs, teachers, startups, or initiatives. BACWAY is open for collabs that bring value to students. Let’s connect and make something big.

library.title: Bacway Library
library.subtitle: Explore a wide range of educational resources uploaded by former baccalaureate students. From recorded lessons to notes and past exams, we have everything you need to prepare for the BAC exam.
library.subject: Subject
library.ctaText: Have resources to share with the next generation?

invite.title: Invite a Contributor
invite.introLine1: If you know a student who has valuable resources, invite them to join the hub.
invite.introLine2: Enter an email and we'll send them a personal invite ✉️
invite.emailNote: We'll only use this email to send one invitation. No spam, ever.
invite.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
invite.error: Failed to send invite. Try again.
invite.privacy: We’ll only use this to send one invitation. They won’t be subscribed to anything.

terms.title: Our Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to BACWAY. By creating an account and using our platform, you agree to comply with the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the platform.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.bacStudent: “Bac Student” refers to any learner using BACWAY resources.
definitions.contributor: “Contributor” refers to any user who shares educational content. Contributors are divided into:
definitions.teacherContributors: Teacher Contributors: educators or mentors sharing verified material.
definitions.studentContributors: Student Contributors: students sharing their notes, summaries, or exercises.

registration.title: Account Registration
registration.item1: Users must provide accurate information when creating an account.
registration.item2: Accounts are personal and may not be shared or transferred.
registration.item3: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials.

duration.title: Account Duration & Inactivity
duration.item1: Contributors: If no contribution is posted within 3 months of opening the account, the account will be deleted automatically.
duration.item2: BACWAY reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts engaged in misconduct, including plagiarism, abuse, or violation of platform rules.

content.title: Content Submission & Ownership
content.item1: Contributors must only upload original content or content they have the right to share.
content.item2: By posting content on BACWAY, contributors grant the platform a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display, distribute, and adapt the material for educational use.
content.item3: Plagiarized or inappropriate content will be removed, and the contributor’s account may be deleted.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Protection
privacy.item1: BACWAY collects and stores personal information (e.g., name, email) only for account management and platform improvement.
privacy.item2: User data will never be sold to third parties.
privacy.item3: Accounts and associated data are deleted permanently once the account is closed.

usage.title: Platform Usage
usage.item1: BACWAY is a free educational service. Commercial use of the platform without prior consent is prohibited.
usage.item2: Technical issues or downtime may occur, and BACWAY does not guarantee uninterrupted access.
usage.item3: Users must not attempt to hack, disrupt, or misuse the platform’s systems.

terms.changesNotice: BACWAY reserves the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time, users will be notified of significant changes through the platform or via email.
terms.contact: For any questions or concerns, please contact us at:

hero.subtitle: Become part of a national community where students uplift each other by sharing real, useful BAC resources. Your uploads matter in shaping their future.
